mapper.select: SELECT version, status, rules_json, create_by, publish_by, publish_time, create_time, update_time FROM risk_rule_version WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' ORDER BY publish_time DESC, version DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT version, status, rules_json, create_by, publish_by, publish_time, create_time, update_time FROM risk_rule_version ORDER BY create_time DESC, version DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE risk_rule_version SET status = #{toStatus}, update_time = NOW() WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED'
UPDATE risk_rule_version SET status = #{status}, publish_by = #{publishBy}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, update_time = NOW() WHERE version = #{version}
